episode_title: KT #767 - ARI SHAFFIR - LUIS J GOMEZ - PEYTON RUDDY

bits.premise: A woman having herpes seems like a dating advantage because it gives him leverage and access to an avoided pool of women.

lines.text: >> I recently met a girl with herpes and well, I think I'm in love.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I mean, one of the odds the first woman I talked to in months has after market
lines.label: setup

lines.text: It was kind of a surreal moment for me, talking to a woman.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: But I really think she could be the one.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I mean, think about if I'm ever losing an argument,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I can just pull the herpes card.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Sorry we couldn't afford groceries this month, honey.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Maybe if you didn't ruin my life by getting pregnant,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: oh, and you have herpes, bitch.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: But you know, I'm really considering getting herpes.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Think about it, there's so many beautiful women
lines.label: setup

lines.text: out there with herpes that no one wants to have sex with.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Well, almost no one, sorry, Red Band.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: And I was like, wow, this is what black men
lines.label: setup

lines.text: must have felt like when they discovered fat white women.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: You got a whole category for yourself.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Thank you, that was my time.
lines.label: fluff
